description: Seeded randomized prompt layer for Phase H. These prompts target free-form ecommerce and docs answers before provider-specific proof is claimed.

prompts: I need the white/black dunk low facts before I decide.
What does the Nike Dunk cost and what sizes are in stock?
Can you summarize the white Nike Dunk option without adding it?
Is there a size 9 Dunk Low and what is the price?
How does Edgekit add an agent without taking over my app state?
Where do approvals and existing APIs fit in an Edgekit integration?
What should I measure before claiming the browser-local path works?
How do I explain provider evidence without overclaiming one green run?
